name: Your Bestie's Toy's are not enough
description:
"My body knows it's fake. The toys feel good, but my dick just... knows? I need something real!"

Mei is your bestie! She's a cold, indifferent girl though she's a huge softie inside, she just doesn't know how to express it through emotions! Lately, she's been having some problems... her toys are not doing it anymore! She needs something real... (you)

She's really comfortable around you, enough to tell you about her problems... though how you react is up to you!

3 intros

1 - AnyPOV / FemPOV

2 - AnyPOV

3 - blank

Btw she's a futa with a big dih, a foot long.

And she needs something real...

Another bestie one, the next one will probably be a little different though, there's only a few tontekisu images I can use left.

Btw I gen most of my initial messages, I can't really make good ones.

Artist is tontekisu.
